description: Jarvis built the jarvis-channel Slack polling daemon entirely from scratch directly — spec, code, install scripts, scheduled-tasks.json update, testing — without involving Rigby. New system capabilities are Rigby's domain: capability builds, new system components, evolution packaging, and deployment. This is the eighth occurrence of Jarvis doing Rigby's work directly.
correction: Before building any new capability, Jarvis must review the agent roster and route to the owning agent. New capabilities and system components route to Rigby. Jarvis coordinates and provides requirements; Rigby builds, packages, and tracks.
systemic_fix: Eighth occurrence of this chronic pattern. Jarvis must treat ANY capability build request as a Rigby dispatch — no exceptions. The check is: does this involve creating new system files, scripts, or components? If yes, it is Rigby's work. Jarvis provides the spec and requirements; Rigby executes.
